title: Passed 10th & Joined SJP
description: Passed 10th grade and joined Sri Jayachamarajendra (Govt) Polytechnic (SJP).

title: Became Class Representative
description: Selected as the Class Representative (CR) for my department.

title: Best CR & 3rd Highest Scorer
description: Awarded Best Class Representative and achieved the 3rd highest score in the department.

title: First Independent Fest
description: Hosted my first independent fest (June - July 2023) featuring cricket, chess, carrom, and badminton tournaments. Concluded with a grand finale and award ceremony to facilitate winners and recognize academic excellence.

title: First Public Speech
description: Gave my first public speech to teachers, investors, and students about our student-funded 3D printing lab.

title: Secured 3D Printers
description: Successfully secured full funding for 2 FDM 3D printers for the lab.

title: Declined Funding Round
description: Was offered a funding round to launch a 3D printing farm but chose not to move forward with the venture.

title: Graduated from SJP
description: Graduated from Sri Jayachamarajendra Polytechnic (farewell on May 7th).

title: First Hackathon
description: Participated in and won my very first hackathon.

title: Admitted to RVCE
description: Secured admission to RV College of Engineering (RVCE), a major achievement in my academic journey.
